creator: Vimarsh Patel
source_text:
Spicy Chilli & Cheddar Ramen

Sometimes you need a big bowl of ramen and to not feel bad about eating it, gotta make it protein packed like this. 

@otoki_global Spicy Chilli & Cheddar ramen mixed with milk, light cream cheese and finished with chilli oil, a jammy egg and chicken! All the cheesy ramen indulgence while still hitting the protein goals! 

Ingredients:

2 chicken thighs (substitute with 1 chicken breast for more protein and less calories)
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp garlic powder
1 tbsp corn starch 
2 boiled eggs

2 tbsp light cream cheese
1 cup partly skimmed milk 
2 packages Otoki Cheesy Ramen in Spicy Chili & Cheddar flavor

For serving:
Chili crisp
Green onions

#cheesyramenpartner #cheesyramen #easyrecipe #protein #spicynoodles
